title: BB's Vanilla+ DeckCraft Adaptation
description: A large Vanilla+ modpack based off of the original DeckCraft modpack by devin. Made to be playable out of the box on Valve's Steam Deck.
body:
**THIS IS A WIP AND HAS NOT BEEN THOUROUGHLY PLAY-TESTED**

> **DISCLAIMER**

I do not own, nor claim to own any of the mods listed in this modpack. I do not own nor claim any of the settings/configuration done by **devin** (the creator of **DeckCraft**) within **DeckCraft**.

I do not endorse any messages of the authors within the mods or modpack, nor do they endorse mine. 

I compiled these mods solely for personal use accross PC and Steam Deck. However, feel free to download, play, or change how you see fit.

I know very little about modpack development and bruteforced this to work. Should you find any bugs, I emplore you to report them to devin if they involve controller configs, or to the individual mod developers the bug may be associated with.

**I CANNOT HELP YOU**

.

> **DESCRIPTION**

**BB's Vanilla+ DeckCraft** modpack is a somewhat large modpack based off of **DeckCraft**, a modpack made by devin. I simply added mods I feel fit Minecraft's style and mods which fix or tweak many issues I have in the game. All Content, as of 9/13/2024 were included to boost and flesh out the base game experience. No new dimensions, no new magic or machinery, just Vanilla and Vanilla+ additions. While this may function on a Steam Deck and it's in-built controls, mouse and keyboard are encouraged to fully utilize all of the mods within this modpack.

> **Major/WIKI-Worthy Mods:** 

Aquamirae, Beneath The Wetlands, Yung's Better X series, Better Nether & Better End, Comforts, EMI, Creeper (and) Enderman Overhaul, Dungeons and Taverns, Farmer's Delight Refabricated, Friends&Foes, Galosphere, Hellion's Sniffer+, Nature's Spirit, Promenade, Ribbits, Spawn, Species, Spelunkery, Supplementaries, and Supplementaries Squared.

Further research into smaller mods is encouraged; again, I brute forced this to work, quite a few mods are in here solely because 'it looks cool' and stays Vanilla esque.

> **CREDITS**

I encourage you to thank these mod developers for their incredible mods. Should you feel the need to donate, I'm sure some may have Patreon or other such donation sites set up. 

Credits are listed alphabetically based on their mods' names.
